api_key.description: Twelve Data API key, sent as the apikey query parameter on every request. Never logged.

base_url.description: Twelve Data API base URL override for tests or proxies.

symbol.description: Ticker symbol the time_series/quote streams are scoped to.

interval.description: Time series bar interval (e.g. 1min, 1day) for the time_series stream.

output_size.description: Number of time series bars to request per read (1-5000).
